mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks (task_id, status, execute_at, payload, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{status}, #{executeAt}, #{payload}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE tasks
status = #{status},
execute_at = #{executeAt},
payload = #{payload},
retry_count = #{retryCount},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tasks WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT task_id, status, execute_at, payload, retryCount FROM tasks WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND updated_at < #{timeout} ORDER BY updated_at ASC
